'''Pedducis Chorios''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Meridian sector/Legends|Meridian sector]] in the [[Pedducis Chorios system/Legends|Pedducis Chorios system]]. After her initial retirement from the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]], [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala|Daala]] led a group of [[Imperial Remnant]] settlers on the world. It was also the world were Warlord [[K'iin]] resided and was home to several pirate bases.

{{Planet-stub}}
